title: (Bullish Signal) BZUN enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Mar 18, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that BZUN's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 77 similar cases where BZUN's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 64 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $44.66 is above $43.73 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/16/21 - 03/18/21, the price experienced a -17% Downtrend. During the week of 03/11/21 - 03/18/21, the stock fell -2%.

https://preview.redd.it/6fsxewd7c0o61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=1ea37d4c89a6288993762f870670ac40f9279c36

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 44 of 56 cases where BZUN's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 18, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on BZUN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 64 of 77 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The 10-day Moving Average for BZUN crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on January 27, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 11 of 14 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

Following a +6.90% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BZUN advanced for three days, in 283 of 340 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

BZUN may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10032100-baozun-inc-adr-bzun-44-13-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-mar-18-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
